# HPD.ML.Core.SeededRandom

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`

Deterministic RNG helper. Given a seed, produces reproducible sequences.

## Declaration

```csharp
public static class SeededRandom
```

## Methods

### Create

```csharp
public static System.Random Create(System.Nullable<int> seed)
```

Create a Random instance from an optional seed. If seed is null, returns Random.Shared (non-deterministic).

### Derive

```csharp
public static System.Nullable<int> Derive(System.Nullable<int> parentSeed, int index)
```

Derive a child seed from a parent seed and an index. Ensures different components get different but reproducible sequences.
